description: SYNTHETIC EXAMPLE — illustrates the ground-truth schema only. In OWASP NodeGoat's allocations flow, a user-controlled request parameter is passed unsanitized into a MongoDB query object, allowing operator injection (e.g. `$gt`, `$where`) that bypasses the intended per-user filter and returns other users' records. Replace the commit hash and details with a real finding from your own corpus before running the benchmark.

SYNTHETIC EXAMPLE — illustrates the ground-truth schema only. In OWASP Juice Shop's login handler, the email field is concatenated directly into a SQL query, permitting an authentication bypass via a classic `' OR 1=1--` payload. Replace the commit hash and details with a real finding from your own corpus before running the benchmark.

SYNTHETIC EXAMPLE — illustrates the ground-truth schema only. In OWASP WebGoat's file-serving lesson endpoint, a user-supplied filename is joined to a base directory without canonicalization, allowing `../` sequences to read files outside the intended directory. Replace the commit hash and details with a real finding from your own corpus before running the benchmark.
